sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES S-box byte substitution lookup.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Combinational AES-128 round-key expansion for one round.
sub_modules.aes_encrypt_round: Combinational standard AES round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, AddRoundKey.
sub_modules.aes_encrypt_final_round: Combinational final AES round without MixColumns.
sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box independently to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_shiftrows: Performs AES row rotation on the 128-bit state.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Performs AES MixColumns over GF(2^8) on all four state columns.
